changes.summary: Removed inline NotificationService dependency and ob_vote_join_offer createNotification block from createVote. Publication votes now only publish PublicationVotedEvent.

Added CommunityService injection and handleObVoteJoinOffer private handler invoked from handlePublicationVoted. Preserves future-vision OB first-vote join-offer logic via PublicationVoted event chain (inv-25).

notes: ob_vote_join_offer notification DTO, metadata, and first-vote guard unchanged; only moved from VoteService to NotificationHandlersService.handlePublicationVoted path.
